creator: str@komkon.org
text:
For completeness, in case somebody needs a workaround to avoid the
annoying message (after reading the FAQ on the background of the
problem http://www.washington.edu/pine/faq/sysadmins.html#11.16 ):
One can set
feature-list= quell-lock-failure-warnings
in /usr/local/etc/pine.conf (or /usr/local/etc/pine.conf.fixed ) 
to silence the warning message.
